global.description: The ad features a dark gradient background with product displays and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting limited stock with free shipping and a discount.

elements.label: dark gradient background
elements.description: A smooth dark gradient background that transitions from black to dark gray.

elements.label: product display
elements.description: A pair of sleek, modern product boxes with reflective surfaces, positioned centrally.

elements.label: decorative circles
elements.description: Three circular decorative elements arranged horizontally, with a subtle shadow effect.

elements.label: additional product display
elements.description: Another product box similar to the main subject, placed at the top right.

elements.label: decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element positioned in the middle left area.

elements.label: additional decorative element
elements.description: A slightly larger decorative element located in the center right area.

elements.label: small decorative circles
elements.description: A cluster of small circular decorative elements at the bottom center.

elements.label: top decorative element
elements.description: A small decorative element positioned at the top left.

elements.label: small decorative circle
elements.description: A small circular decorative element located at the bottom center.

elements.label: small decorative circle
elements.description: Another small circular decorative element positioned slightly lower.

elements.label: small decorative circle
elements.description: A small circular decorative element located at the bottom left.

elements.label: brand name
elements.description: The bold text 'ThreadMarl' displayed prominently at the top of the ad.

elements.label: promotional message
elements.description: The text 'Limited stock Free shipping over $25' in a clear, readable font.

elements.label: call to action
elements.description: The button 'Watch now' at the bottom center, designed to stand out.

elements.label: discount offer
elements.description: A small badge displaying '-30%' in a contrasting color at the bottom left.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main subject is centrally placed, and the CTA is at the bottom.
